rulings.Case Title: PATRICIA A ZARUR VS. TAFFI VASQUEZ ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Quash Service Of Summons And Complaint (Delta Motion)
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, September 28, 2015 line 15. DEFENDANT JIMMY ZARUR's Motion To Quash Service Of Summons And Complaint (Delta Motion) DENIED. The Court has jurisdiction. Complaint sufficiently alleges a cause of action for unlawful detainer. Defendant's counsel is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.6B and provide courtesy copy of the operative complaint in the future. = (501/REQ)
